title: Tamil Nadu election 2026 LIVE: 37.56% voter turnout by 11am; TVK's Vijay requests ECI to extend polling time
description: Tamil Nadu election 2026 LIVE: State chief minister MK Stalin voted in Chennai along with deputy CM Udhayanidhi Stalin, while AIADMK chief Edappadi K Palaniswami cast his vote in Salem. TVK's Vijay, MP Kamal Haasan, and actor Rajinikanth and Ajith Kumar were also seen at booths before 9:00 am.
